headline: Vistra Achieves Investment‑Grade Credit Ratings from S&P and Fitch
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST) today announced that Fitch Ratings has upgraded the company's long-term issuer default rating to investment grade, further strengthening Vistra's credit profile. The action follows S&P Global Ratings' upgrade of Vistra's issuer credit rating to investment grade on Dec. 2, 2025, marking the second investment grade credit rating from a major credit rating agency.

headline: CEG Stock Underperforms Industry in the Past Week: How to Play?
summary: CEG stock slips after a chemical leak, but the nuclear fleet, Big Tech deals and Calpine acquisition position it to tap rising data center power demand.
